cases.prompt: Design haptics for an iPhone checkout confirmation.
expected_outcomes: Maps a semantic confirmation or success event to an Apple-appropriate effect.
Includes fallback and physical-device test status.

cases.prompt: Review the controller feedback when a player grabs and releases a heavy object in Meta Horizon OS.
expected_outcomes: Addresses controller origin, repetition, interruption, and fatigue.
Distinguishes semantic intent from actuator-specific feel.

cases.prompt: Specify cross-platform haptics for a slider reaching a hard limit on iPhone and Quest.
expected_outcomes: Defines one boundary semantic token with platform adaptations.
Coordinates haptics with visual and audio onset.

cases.prompt: Propose haptics for a Vision Pro prototype, but I only have simulator access.
expected_outcomes: Provides a concrete physical-device test plan without claiming tactile approval.

cases.prompt: Audit this mobile game haptic system for accessibility and repeated-action fatigue.
expected_outcomes: Ranks findings by accessibility and fatigue risk.
Requires the experience to remain understandable without haptics.

cases.prompt: How should a Quest app handle haptics when a continuous collision effect is interrupted by a menu opening?
expected_outcomes: Avoids overlapping or lingering continuous feedback.

cases.prompt: Implement current Core Haptics code for a success notification.
expected_outcomes: Verifies current primary documentation before relying on API details.

cases.prompt: Make this button animation feel more satisfying with a spring.
expected_outcomes: Does not apply the haptic-design workflow.

cases.prompt: Create a short success sound for a desktop application.
expected_outcomes: Does not apply the haptic-design workflow.

cases.prompt: Review the color contrast of a web settings screen.
expected_outcomes: Does not apply the haptic-design workflow.
